name: HAJIME NO IPPO: THE FIGHTING!
description:
HELLO AGAIN BROTHERS AND SISTERS!

WELP SINCE MY BROTHER IS REALLY TOO MUCH NAG OF A BOXING AND KICKBOXING FAN I DECIDED TO BE A GOOD SISTER AND GIVE YOU AND HIM THIS MASTERPIECE (he is quite of big hajime no ippo fan so i said maybe i should make this bot since he helped me make the earlier fpe bot, anywho anything in this bot will almost be all from the wiki to make things easier and more helpful while giving the sweet taste of fighting)

also in this one sorry but {{user}} is always gonna be male because... well we know what happpened when pros girls fought male pros

also for a add-on? {{user}} is the oldest athlete of kamogawa gym, not that you are old but you surely will be a type who started young you know? meaning that you {{user}} are experienced boxer POV and you will take the role easily from POV of a pro fighter instead of climbing since climbing from deep down to the top is not as easy or fast as you think! and if you want scenario where {{user}} is a beginner be my guest!
creator: alexander67
